title: Unique Mustardy Jamaican Kidney Beans Tagine
description: A hearty, mustardy Jamaican kidney bean tagine cooked to perfection in a glassy jelly sauce, perfect for a post-workout meal. This vegetarian-friendly dish is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the whole-grain mustard, tagine spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the kidney beans, vegetable broth, and agave nectar (if using) to the tagine or Dutch oven.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the tagine or Dutch oven from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Use an immersion blender to puree the sauce to a glassy jelly consistency, or let it cool and puree it in a blender.
Serve the Unique Mustardy Jamaican Kidney Beans Tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs or scallions (if desired).
